name: Kielbasa & Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 2 Red delicious apples, cored and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, nonstick Dutch oven with a lid, melt the cooking fat over medium heat.
2. Stir in the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion is pale yellow and soft.
3. Reduce the heat to low. Leave the onion in the bottom of the pan where it will begin to brown and turn very sweet.
4. Pile the shredded cabbage on top.
5. Sprinkle with beef bouillon.
6. Add the sliced apples, fennel seed, and pepper.
7. Cut the kielbasa into 6 pieces. Slit each piece about 1/3 through.
8. Place the slices on top of the apples.
9. Add the canned potatoes and water.
10. Cover. Increase the heat to high until the water begins to boil, then reduce the heat to simmer.
11. After about 5 minutes, stir the pot until all the items are evenly mixed.
12. Continue cooking until the cabbage is tender crisp and all ingredients are hot.
